title: Earthy Ukrainian Coconut Cream Braise
description: A halal-friendly meal-prep dish featuring coconut cream, carrots, onions, and garlic in a flavorful braising liquid for an earthy and crisp texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onions and minced garlic, sautéing for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots to the pot with the vegetables, stirring well to coat them in the oil and garlic mixture.
Pour in the coconut milk, water or chicken stock, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 30-45 minutes until carrots are tender and liquid has reduced slightly.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed. Remove from heat and serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
